CustomField.description: Select the appropriate type. Use Correction for invoice errors or billing adjustments. [LOAD:Yes] [JUSTIFICATION:Load the type of Credit Memo whether Overpayment or Correction] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the purpose of this credit memo. Billing Adjustment: Corrects an invoicing error.Reduces the invoiced amount and does not increase MR or SD funds when applied to invoices. Cash Credit: Represents a cash-like credit (e.g., overpayment, goodwill).Reduces the invoice balance and increases MR/SD funds when applied to invoices
CustomField.label: Credit Memo Type
